title: Differentiated Instruction Adapter
description: Take an existing activity and suggest variations for different learner needs.
template: Adapt this classroom activity or assignment for {gradeLevel}: {activityDescription}. Suggest 2-3 ways to adapt it: one version with additional scaffolding/support, one on-level version, and one extension for students who finish early or need more challenge. Keep suggestions general — do not ask for or reference any specific student's diagnosis, IEP, or 504 plan; if I mention one, remind me this tool isn't for individualized service planning.

fields.label: Activity description
fields.placeholder: Describe the classroom activity or assignment.
